name: send_to_workstream
description: Send a user-turn message to a child workstream. The child's worker thread dispatches it through its own ChatSession loop. Use to continue a conversation, provide feedback, or ask a follow-up. Your message lands as the 'user' role on that workstream.

ws_id.description: Workstream id that should receive the message.

message.description: Message text to append as a user turn.
